description_long: This bonsai features a sturdy, upright trunk with a light grayish-brown bark texture, supporting a broad canopy of vibrant green foliage. The trunk rises vertically before branching out into several thick, angular limbs, each adorned with clusters of lush, deeply lobed leaves. The foliage is concentrated toward the outer edges of the branches, creating a balanced yet slightly asymmetrical silhouette. The leaves are dense and healthy, giving the tree a full, lively appearance, while the trunk and branches display subtle natural irregularities. The overall form suggests careful pruning and shaping, typical of bonsai artistry, with a harmonious blend of structure and organic growth. No pot or container is visible, focusing attention solely on the tree's natural form.
description: A lush, upright bonsai with a thick, textured trunk and dense clusters of green leaves, shaped into a broad, balanced canopy. The branches spread outward, giving the tree a full and lively appearance.
description_view_0: The bonsai is seen with its trunk centered and a rounded canopy, showing dense foliage on both sides and a clear view of the main trunk.
description_view_1: This view highlights the tree's broadest spread, with the trunk slightly off-center and the branches extending widely to the left and right.
description_view_2: The bonsai appears more asymmetrical, with the majority of the foliage and branches leaning to the right, revealing more of the trunk's side.
description_view_3: The canopy is seen from a slightly higher angle, emphasizing the horizontal spread of the branches and the dense leaf clusters on the left.
attribute_pot_type: No pot is visible; the bonsai appears without a container.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The trunk is mostly straight with a slight natural curve, resembling the formal upright (Chokkan) bonsai style, with minor irregularities and gentle bends.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are moderately dense and spread outward in a somewhat radial pattern, with clusters of leaves at the tips, creating a balanced but slightly asymmetrical silhouette.
attribute_leaf_density: The foliage is dense, especially at the branch tips, giving the bonsai a lush and full appearance with minimal gaps.
